title: Crunchy Uruguayan Butter Crumble
description: A post-workout dish featuring green olives, reduced in liquid to create a crunchy texture and enhanced with a dash of salt for extra flavor.
instructions: Mix the reduced beef broth, minced garlic, and a dash of salt in a small bowl.
Add green olives to the mixture and gently fold everything together until all pieces are coated with the liquid.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish or shallow pan.
Place in preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
